title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.195 - Violation of law by person not licensed — penalty
text:
338.195.  Violation of law by person not licensed — penalty. — Any person, who is not licensed under this chapter, who violates any provision of sections 338.010 to 338.315 shall, upon conviction, be adjudged guilty of a class D felony.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1287, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
